items.title: Homan: ICE Surge in Minnesota to End
items.description: Border czar Tom Homan announced Thursday that Immigration and Customs Enforcement is ending its "Operation Metro Surge" in Minneapolis, Minnesota.

items.title: Rep. Tenney to Newsmax: Tenney: Dem Anti-Voter ID Stance 'Misogynistic, Racist'
items.description: Democrats' stance against voter ID is, among other things, "misogynistic and it's racist," Rep. Claudia Tenney, R-N.Y., told Newsmax on Thursday.
